data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Walk-in support (queue management)', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is fully satisfied. While there is evidence of a customer entering a waitlist/queue flow, it does not provide comprehensive details on how the queue management system operates or its effectiveness in managing walk-ins. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement for walk-in support, as it lacks specific details on the functionality and user experience related to queue management.
gaps: No detailed evidence on the effectiveness and functionality of the queue management system for walk-ins.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add detailed evidence for queue management functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete examples of how the queue management system handles walk-in customers.
